positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic, winged celestial creature (like a griffon or phoenix), interwoven with glowing astral geometry patterns and detailed cosmic nebulae. The composition should be highly symmetrical, centered, and designed for maximum contrast and visibility on a dark fabric. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, amethyst purple, emerald green) contrasted sharply against glowing gold and electric cyan highlights. Focus on clean silhouettes, intricate linework, and an ethereal, yet bold, mystical aesthetic. Mid-century modern tattoo art meets neo-tribal geometric design. Highly detailed, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing, centered composition.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low resolution, grainy, amateur drawing, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, dirty, monochrome, realistic photograph
